title: A reason should be provided when skipping a test
description: Tests that skip themselves should provide a reason for doing so.
message: Test should provide a reason when skipped.
recommendation: Always provide a reason for skipping a test.

noncompliant.description: A test skips itself with a reason provided.
A test skips itself without providing a reason.

compliant.code:
def test_something():
    unittest.skip('Skipping this test due to a known issue')
compliant.description: A test skips itself with an explicit and meaningful reason.

why_is_this_an_issue: Skipped tests make it difficult to understand why certain tests are being ignored, potentially leading to missed issues.
how_to_fix: Always provide a reason for skipping a test.
